name: Blockout Trading Skill
description: A multi-signal regime-aware trading strategy Skill for BNB Chain. Combines RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, CMC Fear & Greed Index, and social sentiment from the CoinMarketCap AI Agent Hub into a composite signal with regime detection (bull/bear/sideways). Designed for backtesting on BSC tokens using CMC historical OHLCV and indicator data.
author: Blockout
hackathon: BNB Hack: AI Trading Agent Edition ⚡️ CoinMarketCap × Trust Wallet

data_sources.name: CoinMarketCap Pro API
data_sources.usage: Real-time price, OHLCV candles (100 hourly), RSI-14, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Fear & Greed index, social sentiment score, and trending rank

rsi_oversold.description: RSI-14 threshold below which a buy signal is generated

rsi_overbought.description: RSI-14 threshold above which a sell signal is generated

bb_width_threshold.description: Bollinger Band width below which market is classified as sideways

ma_slope_threshold.description: MA-20 slope threshold for bull/bear regime classification

ath_drop_pct.description: Percentage drop from session ATH that triggers MidBattle scalping entry

stop_loss_pct.description: Stop-loss distance as % from entry price

take_profit_pct.description: Take-profit distance as % from entry price

max_drawdown_pct.description: Maximum portfolio drawdown before circuit breaker halts trading

fear_greed_buy_threshold.description: Fear & Greed index below which fear regime amplifies buy signals

fear_greed_sell_threshold.description: Fear & Greed index above which greed regime amplifies sell signals

regime_detection.description: Classifies market into bull/bear/sideways using Bollinger Band width and MA-20 slope vs MA-50

logic.sideways: BB width < bb_width_threshold OR ma50 == 0 (indicators unavailable)
logic.bull: MA-20 slope > ma_slope_threshold AND price > MA-50

signals.name: MidBattle ATH Scalping
signals.note: Fires at any regime. Session ATH is the highest price since agent start.

composite_signal.description: Weighted confidence aggregation across active signals
composite_signal.side_resolution: majority vote across active signals (tie → buy)
composite_signal.note: Any non-zero confidence composite in the allowed regime triggers a position attempt

risk_management.stop_loss: entry * (1 - stop_loss_pct/100) for buys; entry * (1 + stop_loss_pct/100) for sells
risk_management.take_profit: entry * (1 + take_profit_pct/100) for buys; entry * (1 - take_profit_pct/100) for sells
risk_management.circuit_breaker: Halt all trading if portfolio drawdown from baseline >= max_drawdown_pct
risk_management.mev_defense: Orders above $50 are split into 10 randomized TWAP chunks (Anaconda Squeeze)

live_execution.chain: BSC Testnet (Chain ID 97) / BSC Mainnet (Chain ID 56)
live_execution.signing: ethers.js v6 direct signing (TWAK CLI optional upgrade path)
